headline: How Booking won online travel & can it win AI travel?
summary: Investing.com -- Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) remains one of the strongest players in online travel, but artificial intelligence could eventually challenge some of the company’s competitive advantages, according to a report from Bernstein.
